title: Purchase Orders
subtitle: Order from suppliers and receive goods against each order
emptyDesc: Create your first purchase order to track goods on the way in.
failedToLoadDesc: Could not fetch purchase orders. Check your connection and try again.
cancelMessage: Cancel this order? It cannot be received afterwards.
deleteMessage: Delete this draft order? This cannot be undone.
actionFailed: The action failed. Please try again.

form.noLines: Add at least one line to save the order.
form.errorSavingFallback: Could not save the purchase order. Check the fields and try again.

receive.title: Receive goods — {{number}}
receive.subtitle: Record what arrived; partial receipts can be repeated
receive.destinationSectionDesc: Where the received goods are stored
receive.linesSectionDesc: Enter the quantity that actually arrived for each line
receive.serialsHelper: Enter exactly one serial number per received unit.
receive.serialsMismatch: The number of serials must match the quantity.
receive.nothingToReceive: This order has nothing left to receive.
receive.notReceivable: Only confirmed orders can be received.
